notes: Unified savings projection — single source of truth for the savings/cash balance, used by BOTH the Projection sheet and the Net Worth page so they always agree. New projectSavingsChain(p) function: past months reverse-walk to true closing balances; current/future months compound prior balance by monthly cash interest (4% p.a. → (1.04)^(1/12)−1 ≈ 0.327%/mo) then add the residue (surplus − scheduled investments − one-time investments). Projection sheet's _eomSavingsChain now applies the same monthly interest (previously omitted interest entirely). Net Worth page now derives its cash component and net worth from projectSavingsChain, replacing the old adjustedCashSeries patches (_nwNetSavingsDeltaThruMonth / cumGapNW) that were a separate, divergent attempt to undo the engine's double-counting of past-month contributions. Result: net worth at any month is now identical on both pages = investments + savings-chain + liabilities, with cash interest correctly earned monthly and no double-counting. Transaction/adjustment edits flow consistently into both views.
